Display and flash driver resources, button, serial, PMIC, system flash, and watchdog driver implementations.

## Folders
- **[display](display/README.md)**: Bitmap and bit pattern resources for display drivers and driver implementation for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display.
- **[flash](flash/README.md)**: CRC32 checksum calculation and MX25U flash memory driver with initialization and data functions.

## Files
- **[button.c](button.c.md)**: Button driver implementation for initializing and reading the state of buttons on the board.
- **[button.h](button.h.md)**: Functions for button initialization and state checking in the Pebble firmware.
- **[button_id.h](button_id.h.md)**: Defines an enumeration for button IDs used in UI interactions.
- **[dbgserial.c](dbgserial.c.md)**: Implements serial debugging functions for the Pebble firmware, including message formatting and transmission.
- **[dbgserial.h](dbgserial.h.md)**: Serial debugging functions for initialization, string output, and formatted printing.
- **[display.h](display/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing, deinitializing, and managing display operations during boot and updates.
- **[flash.h](flash/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing, reading, checking, and calculating checksums on a flash memory chip.
- **[pmic.c](pmic.c.md)**: Driver for initializing and configuring the PMIC using I2C communication on the Asterix platform.
- **[pmic.h](pmic.h.md)**: Header file for initializing the Power Management IC (PMIC) in the Pebble firmware.
- **[system_flash.c](system_flash.c.md)**: Functions for erasing and writing to system flash memory with progress callbacks and alignment checks.
- **[system_flash.h](system_flash.h.md)**: Functions for erasing and writing to flash memory with optional progress callbacks.
- **[watchdog.c](watchdog.c.md)**: Watchdog driver implementation for nRF52840, including initialization, kicking, and reset flag check.
- **[watchdog.h](watchdog.h.md)**: Header file for watchdog timer functions: initialization, kicking, and reset flag checking.
